description_long: This house features a two-story main structure with a brown, multi-gabled roof and white exterior walls. The front facade includes a covered porch with columns, a central entryway, and several windows arranged in a balanced pattern. To one side, there is a detached garage connected by a covered walkway, and the property is bordered by a low wall with lush palm trees and a landscaped yard. The rear of the house opens to a spacious patio area with outdoor seating and a gazebo, providing ample space for relaxation and gatherings. Large glass doors and windows at the back offer views and access to the garden and pool area. The overall design blends Mediterranean and contemporary elements, with a focus on outdoor living and natural light.
description: A two-story house with a brown gabled roof, white walls, a detached garage, and a landscaped yard with palm trees and a pool. The design features a covered porch, large windows, and a spacious rear patio with a gazebo.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a covered porch, the detached garage to the right, and the landscaped yard with palm trees in the background.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, the garage, and the extensive patio area with a gazebo and pool visible behind the wall.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying large glass doors, the pool area surrounded by palm trees, and the gazebo, with the garage and walkway to the left.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the patio, gazebo, and the multi-gabled roof structure, with the main house and garage in profile.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large glass doors at the rear
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with a covered porch, columns, steps, and a decorative overhang
